EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Referee Invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Would you be willing to provide a reference?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE'D LOVE YOUR INPUT.
Hi {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c},
{!b3o__Reference__c.Candidate_Name__c} has applied for a role with Alliance Rural & Remote Health, and you've been nominated as their reference. We’d value your input on their character, performance, and how well they might suit this role.
PROVIDE REFERENCE
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
